dataset_name: Monozygotic XMEN twins with EBV-positive classic Hodgkin lymphoma WGS
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Very small cohort; case-report scale, not a large epidemiologic cohort.
why_keep: Best directly downloadable HL/EBV human WGS hit found; two runs exceed 40 GB.

dataset_name: CGCI Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma direct-open DLBCL cell-line WGS subset
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs for the public subset
limitations: Only the 13 public SRA WGS runs are direct; most project WGS runs have @dbgap@ paths and are not direct-download.
why_keep: Best directly downloadable DLBCL/NHL WGS-scale set; useful for method testing and false-positive viral noise checks in lymphoma genomes.

dataset_name: Genomic characterization of lymphomas in patients with inborn errors of immunity
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: WGS runs are below the 40 GB compressed-size heuristic, although several are 25-38 GB and the biology is relevant.
why_keep: Open human WGS from immunodeficiency-associated lymphoma context; useful bridge between viral susceptibility and lymphoma.

dataset_name: Whole-genome sequencing of HTLV-1-infected cell lines
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Cell-line WGS; not primary HTLV patient cfDNA/WGS.
why_keep: Directly relevant to P1 HTLV discrimination and host/retroviral mapping controls.

dataset_name: Oxford Nanopore WGS of EBV-positive Burkitt lymphoma cell line EB-3
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Single cell-line run; Burkitt lymphoma not HL/DLBCL/PTLD.
why_keep: Large directly downloadable EBV-positive lymphoma cell-line WGS for viral-mapping stress testing.

dataset_name: Primary effusion lymphoma BC-3 WGS for HHV8 integration/amplification
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Primary effusion lymphoma and HHV8, not target diseases; one ONT and one Illumina/large WGS run.
why_keep: Useful herpesvirus-positive lymphoma control and integration/mapping benchmark.

direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URL
limitations: Single EBV-positive Burkitt lymphoma cell line; not patient WGS.
why_keep: Direct EBV-rich lymphoma cell-line WGS positive control.

dataset_name: Whole-genome sequencing of EBV in Japan across EBV-associated diseases
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Viral-genome hybrid-selection WGS, not human WGS; cannot support anellovirus or host-WGS claims.
why_keep: Directly downloadable EBV genomes including samples from PTLD, DLBCL, and HL; useful for EBV reference/variant validation.

dataset_name: EBV whole-genome sequencing from transplant recipients with PTLD
direct_download_mode: SRA Toolkit or direct SRA download_path URLs
limitations: Amplicon EBV sequencing, not human WGS; small total size.
why_keep: Only direct PTLD-specific EBV sequencing found; useful for EBV variation, not for host WGS/anellovirus detection.
